name: No Boil Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 lb package of Gioia Lasagna (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a saucepan, brown the ground beef and drain excess fat. Add the spaghetti sauce and water, then bring to a boil.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the ricotta cheese, beaten egg, Mozzarella cheese, 1/3 cup water, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, parsley flakes, nutmeg, salt, and pepper (if desired).
4. To assemble, use lasagna strips uncooked but rinse in hot water before layering in a 9x13 inch baking pan. Approximately 4 lasagna strips will fit in the pan for a single layer (3 lengthwise and 1 crosswise).
5. Layer as follows: sauce, lasagna strips, cheese mixture, sauce, lasagna strips, remaining sauce, and top with Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake covered with aluminum foil for 40 minutes. Remove foil and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before cutting.
8. Serves 6 to 8.
